final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo for a Weibo news/trending-topic banner, strict 16:9 wide format, photojournalistic documentary style.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary photography, handheld-feel smartphone editorial shot, sharp details with natural optical imperfections, in the spirit of street photojournalism — real-scene immediacy over studio polish
Composition: wide horizontal frame, 16:9 cinematic crop, deep perspective with city skyline stretching across the full width, generous sky area and lower-third negative space reserved for text overlay, slight natural lens distortion
Subject: urban dusk cityscape — hurrying pedestrians as silhouettes in the foreground, towering skyscrapers in the mid-to-far ground with glass facades reflecting the last embers of sunset, neon signs beginning to glow against the deepening sky
Scene/backdrop: Chinese metropolis at golden hour transitioning to blue hour — warm amber sunset glow on building tops, cool violet-blue sky above, street-level neon signage flickering on, motion blur on passing figures suggesting rush-hour pace
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro between warm sunset backlight and cool neon fill; hard rim light on building edges, deep shadows in street canyons, high contrast that reads as visceral and immediate
Color palette: warm amber and burnt orange as sunset anchor against a deep indigo-violet sky; neon accent colors (red, cyan, pale yellow) punctuate the midground; cool shadow tones in the street level
Materials/textures: glass curtain-wall reflections with visible distortion, wet pavement with neon reflections, visible atmospheric haze near the horizon
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" as bold headline in a prominent position; "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" as subtitle beneath; "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" as small watermark at bottom-right corner
Constraints: all three text strings must appear exactly as provided; headline uses a bold modern Gothic/黑体-style typeface; watermark is small and unobtrusive; lower third and sky area kept relatively clean to support text legibility
Avoid: studio lighting look, over-saturated HDR tone-mapping, fake lens flare overlays, generic stock-photo composition, watermark-style logo badges unrelated to the specified text, blurry or illegible Chinese characters
